rationales.hook_strength: 'Why your energy crashes after lunch' is specific and relatable, though the sub-headline over-explains and dilutes the scroll-stop.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is one idea with a clear label, logical sequence, and an actionable dose in slide 3.
rationales.audience_fit: The 3pm crash is the exact pain point for busy 20–35s, and the vinaigrette workaround removes friction.
rationales.novelty: The vinegar-before-carbs angle has circulated widely on glucose-optimization TikTok; the salad dressing reframe is the only fresh touch.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged ('may blunt', 'may flatten'), voice is plain and mechanic-forward, CTA ties naturally to the meal-snapping feature.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the actionable tip and vinaigrette hack, but novelty ceiling limits virality versus a truly contrarian hook.
